company: GE Medical Systems Ultrasound and Primary Care Diagnostics
intended_use: Vivid Pioneer is a general-purpose ultrasound system, specialized for use in cardiac imaging. It is intended for use by, or under the direction of a qualified and trained physician or sonographer for
intended_use_full: Vivid Pioneer is a general-purpose ultrasound system, specialized for use in cardiac imaging. It is intended for use by, or under the direction of a qualified and trained physician or sonographer for ultrasound imaging, measurement, display and analysis of the human body and fluid.
target_condition: Cardiac conditions requiring diagnostic ultrasound imaging; also supports abdominal, vascular, musculoskeletal, and other general ultrasound applications
ground_truth: Manual measurements by two cardiologists following US ASE annotation guidelines, with consensus review by clinical expert panels (5 experts for AI Auto Doppler, 3 experts for AI FlexiViews LAA)
other_metrics: AI Auto Doppler: mean absolute percentage error across all cardiac cycles passed acceptance criteria; mean performance metric for tissue Doppler BMI <25: -0.002 (SD=0.077), BMI ≥25: -0.006 (SD=0.081); flow Doppler BMI <25: 0.021 (SD=0.073), BMI ≥25: 0.003 (SD=0.057); feasibility score >95% required
